apierror-discouragetranslation-invalidti: Cinwaanka la codsaday looma calaamadin turjumaad.
apierror-discouragetranslation-alreadydo: Cinwaanka la codsaday hore ayuu u leeyahay xaaladda niyad jabka ee la codsaday.
apihelp-discouragetranslation-summary: Calaamadee bog la turjumi karo inuu yahay mid niyad-jabsan ama aan niyad-jabsanayn. [https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/Help:Extension:Translate/Page_translation_administration#discourage Bogagga niyad jabsan] waxaa laga qariyaa is-dhexgalka turjumaadda marka la raadinayo bogag la turjumi karo, laakiin weli si toos ah ayaa loo turjumi karaa.
apihelp-discouragetranslation-param-titl: Cinwaanka bogga la falgalayo. Midkood <var>title</var> ama <var>pageid</var> waa in la dejiyaa.
apihelp-discouragetranslation-param-page: Aqoonsiga bogga ee bogga la falgalayo. Midkood <var>title</var> ama <var>pageid</var> waa in la dejiyaa.
apihelp-discouragetranslation-param-do: Ficilka la doonayo in lagu fuliyo bogga.
apihelp-discouragetranslation-paramvalue: Calaamadee bogga inuu yahay mid niyad-jabsan, taasoo ka dhigaysa in laga qariyo liisaska bogagga la turjumi karo.
Bogga ka saar calaamadda niyad-jabka, taasoo ka dhigaysa in lagu muujiyo liisaska bogagga la turjumi karo.
apihelp-discouragetranslation-param-reas: Soo koobid diiwaan ah oo la adeegsanayo marka lagu diiwaangelinayo [[Special:Log/pagetranslation]]
